DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: DEFENDANT PHYLLIS J. HAMPTON. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED.
